name: Azalea Table Lamp - 18.75 Inch Height - TBL3021 - White/Multi - Safavieh
description: Brighten up your space with the versatile charm of the Azalea Table Lamp. A harmonious blend of white and vibrant hues, this lamp features a sturdy terrazzo base, complemented by sleek iron detailing, bringing a dash of modernity to any room. Illuminate your surroundings with a lamp that's as practical as it is stylish?perfect for nightstands, workspaces, or as a contemporary statement piece in your living area. Light up your world with the eclectic flair of the Azalea Table Lamp, where functional design meets visual interest.
